ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lgas" (
  "lga_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LGA */,
  "lga_name" TEXT /* Name of the LGA */,
  "lga_code" TEXT /* Code for the LGA (e.g., C7, C32) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the LGA is located */,
  "expenditure" INTEGER /* Total expenditure of the LGA */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the LGA */,
  "expenditure_rate_id" INTEGER /* Expenditure rate of the LGA */,
  "population_rate_id" INTEGER /* Population rate of the LGA */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the LGA in square kilometers */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the LGA was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the LGA's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lgas_expenditure_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_rate_id") REFERENCES expenditure_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lgas_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lgas_population_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_rate_id") REFERENCES population_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Country, Metropolitan) */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the region was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the region's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure rate */,
  "rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure rate */,
  "threshold_low" INTEGER /* Lower threshold for the expenditure rate */,
  "threshold_high" INTEGER /* Upper threshold for the expenditure rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the expenditure rate was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population rate */,
  "rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the population rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population rate */,
  "threshold_low" INTEGER /* Lower threshold for the population rate */,
  "threshold_high" INTEGER /* Upper threshold for the population rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the population rate was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the expenditure category was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_details" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure entry */,
  "lga_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LGA the expenditure belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure category */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of expenditure */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expenditure */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the expenditure detail was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_details_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expenditure_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_details_lga_id FOREIGN KEY ("lga_id") REFERENCES lgas ("lga_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend entry */,
  "lga_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LGA the population trend belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population trend */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the LGA in that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate for the given year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the population trend was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_lga_id FOREIGN KEY ("lga_id") REFERENCES lgas ("lga_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., government official, analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the user's data was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
